subject: fix(docs,types,quality): comprehensive audit fixes
body:
Bug fix:
- Fix runtime error in useNotifications.ts: setIsEnabled() does not
  exist (isEnabled is derived). Set underlying states instead.

Type safety:
- Add missing onesignal_player_id to AppInstance interface
- Add missing ended_by to Chat interface

Dead code removal:
- Remove 15 unused tone category color tokens from theme.js and
  tailwind.config.js (old 5-category system replaced by custom tones)
- Remove unused imports: LinearGradient (ChatListItem), Platform
  (InstallInstructionsModal), Dimensions (TutorialModal), useCallback
  (MessageBubble), ChatInsert/ChatWithParticipants (chat.ts),
  registerWebPushServiceWorker/getOneSignalPermissionStatus
  (useNotifications)
- Remove unused noop variable from logger.ts

Documentation:
- Rewrite README.md: fix tone system description (was 25 tones / 5
  categories, now 6 defaults + custom), remove references to deleted
  useToneUsage/toneUsage/tone_usage, fix PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS_SETUP
  link, remove false LICENSE claim, fix package.json metadata
- CLAUDE.md: add utils/debugLog.ts to project structure, fix
  EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md reference (file doesn't exist)
- Fix stale onesignal.ts comments referencing web/index.html
  (should be app/+html.tsx)
- Fix package.json name/description/author from template leftovers

Tags: docs, type-safety, dead-code, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Fhkb1mVtQPFdmLVbTkkNEH
title: comprehensive audit fixes
